glosses.ro: a fi anulat; a se strica
glosses.ja: 中止になる; 故障する

translations.en: The class will be canceled today.
translations.nl: De les gaat vandaag niet door.
translations.el: Το μάθημα σήμερα δεν θα γίνει.
translations.ja: 今日は授業が休講です。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular masculine; determiner of the subject noun 'Unterricht'.
Masculine noun, nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite auxiliary (3rd person singular, present); forms Futur I with the infinitive at clause end; agrees with the subject.
Temporal adverb modifying the predicate.
Main verb in infinitive; separable-prefix verb; complements 'wird' to express future (Futur I).

sentences.target: Der Zug kann wegen des Streiks ausfallen.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ tsuːk kan ˈveːɡən deːs ʃtʁaɪ̯ks ˈaʊ̯sˌfalən./

translations.de: Der Zug kann wegen des Streiks ausfallen.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ tsuːk kan ˈveːɡən deːs ʃtʁaɪ̯ks ˈaʊ̯sˌfalən./
translations.en: The train might be canceled due to the strike.
translations.es: El tren podría cancelarse por la huelga.
translations.fr: Le train pourrait être annulé à cause de la grève.
translations.it: Il treno potrebbe essere cancellato a causa dello sciopero.
translations.ko: 파업 때문에 기차가 취소될 수도 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 由于罢工，火车可能会停运。
translations.yue: 因為罷工，火車可能會停開。
translations.ru: Поезд может быть отменён из‑за забастовки.
translations.pt: O trem pode ser cancelado por causa da greve.
translations.vi: Chuyến tàu có thể bị hủy vì đình công.
translations.nl: De trein kan uitvallen vanwege de staking.
translations.uk: Поїзд може бути скасований через страйк.
translations.hu: A vonat a sztrájk miatt lehet, hogy nem közlekedik.
translations.hi: हड़ताल के कारण ट्रेन रद्द हो सकती है.
translations.pl: Pociąg może zostać odwołany z powodu strajku.
translations.el: Το τρένο μπορεί να ακυρωθεί λόγω της απεργίας.
translations.nb: Toget kan bli innstilt på grunn av streiken.
translations.sv: Tåget kan ställas in på grund av strejken.
translations.ro: Trenul ar putea fi anulat din cauza grevei.
translations.cs: Vlak může být kvůli stávce zrušen.
translations.da: Toget kan blive aflyst på grund af strejken.
translations.ja: ストのため電車が運休になるかもしれません。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular masculine; determiner of 'Zug'.
Masculine noun, nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Modal auxiliary (3rd person singular, present); expresses possibility and selects an infinitive complement.
Preposition governing genitive; introduces the reason PP.
Definite article, genitive singular masculine; determiner within the PP headed by 'wegen'.
Masculine noun, genitive singular; object of the preposition 'wegen'.
Main verb in infinitive; separable-prefix verb; complement of the modal 'kann'.

translations.en: The Wi‑Fi could go down again.
translations.es: El Wi‑Fi podría fallar otra vez.
translations.it: Il Wi‑Fi potrebbe saltare di nuovo.
translations.pt: O Wi‑Fi pode cair de novo.
translations.vi: Wi‑Fi có thể lại bị mất.
translations.ar: قد ينقطع الواي فاي مرة أخرى.
translations.hi: वाइ‑फाइ फिर से बंद हो सकता है.
translations.el: Το Wi‑Fi μπορεί να πέσει ξανά.
translations.ro: Wi‑Fi-ul ar putea să pice din nou.
translations.ja: Wi‑Fiがまた切れるかもしれません。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular neuter; determiner of 'WLAN'.
Neuter common noun; head of the subject NP.
Modal auxiliary (Konjunktiv II, 3rd person singular, present); marks possibility/uncertainty; selects an infinitive.
Adverb indicating repetition; modifies the predicate.
Main verb in infinitive; separable-prefix verb; complement of 'könnte' (here: 'to fail/go down').

translations.en: My appointment has to be canceled.
translations.es: Por desgracia tengo que cancelar mi cita.
translations.fr: Malheureusement, je dois annuler mon rendez‑vous.
translations.it: Purtroppo devo cancellare il mio appuntamento.
translations.zh-Hans: 很遗憾我得取消我的预约。
translations.yue: 唔好意思，我要取消個約。
translations.ru: К сожалению, мне придётся отменить запись.
translations.pt: Infelizmente eu preciso cancelar meu compromisso.
translations.he: לצערי עליי לבטל את התור שלי.
translations.vi: Tiếc là tôi phải hủy lịch hẹn của mình.
translations.nl: Helaas moet ik mijn afspraak afzeggen.
translations.uk: На жаль, мені доведеться скасувати свій запис.
translations.hu: Sajnos le kell mondanom az időpontomat.
translations.hi: अफ़सोस, मुझे अपनी अपॉइंटमेंट रद्द करनी पड़ेगी.
translations.el: Δυστυχώς πρέπει να ακυρώσω το ραντεβού μου.
translations.nb: Dessverre må jeg avlyse timen min.
translations.id: Sayangnya saya harus membatalkan janji saya.
translations.sv: Tyvärr måste jag avboka min tid.
translations.ro: Din păcate trebuie să îmi anulez programarea.
translations.da: Desværre må jeg aflyse min aftale.
translations.ja: 残念ですが予約をキャンセルしないといけません。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, nominative singular masculine; modifies 'Termin'.
Masculine noun, nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Modal auxiliary (3rd person singular, present); expresses necessity; selects an infinitive complement.
Sentence adverb expressing the speaker's attitude; modifies the clause.
Main verb in infinitive; separable-prefix verb; complement of the modal 'muss'.
